West Indian Court of Appeal Act 1919
Coal Mines Act 1919 (repealed 20.11.1993)
items.description: An Act to amend the Coal Mines Acts, 1887 to 1914, with respect to the Hours of Employment below Ground.

items.title: Ministry Of Transport Act 1919
items.description: An Act to establish a Ministry of Transport and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: War Pensions (Administrative Provisions) Act 1919
items.description: An Act to make further provision for the administration of the enactments relating to Naval, Military and Air Force War Pensions, Grants and Allowances, and for certain other purposes connected with such Pensions, Grants and Allowances.

items.title: Acquisition of Land (Assessment of Compensation) Act 1919
items.description: An Act to amend the law as to the Assessment of Compensation in respect of Land acquired compulsorily for public purposes and the costs in proceedings thereon.

items.title: Land Settlement (Facilities) Act 1919
items.description: An Act to make further provision for the acquisition of land for the purposes of small holdings, reclamation, and drainage, to amend the enactments relating to small holdings and allotments, and otherwise to facilitate land settlement.

items.title: British Mercantile Marine Uniform Act 1919 (repealed 1.1.1996)
items.description: An Act to make provision with respect to the British Mercantile Marine Uniform.

items.title: Agricultural Land Sales (Restriction of Notice to Quit) Act 1919
Welsh Church (Temporalities) Act 1919
items.description: An Act to continue in office the Welsh Commissioners appointed under the Welsh Church Act, 1914, to postpone the date of disestablishment, and to make further provision with respect to the temporalities of, and marriages in, the Church in Wales.

items.title: Constabulary and Police (Ireland) Act 1919
items.description: An Act to amend the Law relating to the Royal Irish Constabulary and Dublin Metropolitan Police.

items.title: Industrial Courts Act 1919 (repealed 16.10.1992)
items.description: An Act to provide for the establishment of an Industrial Court and Courts of Inquiry in connection with Trade Disputes, and to make other provision for the settlement of such disputes, and to continue for a limited period certain of the provisions of the Wages (Temporary Regulation) Act, 1918.

items.title: Increase of Rent and Mortgage Interest (Restrictions) Act 1919
County Court Judges (Retirement Pensions and Deputies) Act 1919
Sex Disqualification (Removal) Act 1919
items.description: An Act to amend the Law with respect to disqualifications on account of sex.

items.title: Ferries (Acquisition By Local Authorities) Act 1919
items.description: An Act to enable Local Authorities to acquire existing Ferries by Agreement.

items.title: Church of England Assembly (Powers) Act 1919
items.description: An Act to confer powers on the National Assembly of the Church of England constituted in accordance with the constitution attached as an Appendix to the Addresses presented to His Majesty by the Convocations of Canterbury and York on the tenth day of May nineteen hundred and nineteen, and for other purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Representation of the People (Returning Officers' Expenses) Act 1919
Irish Land (Provision for Sailors and Soldiers) Act 1919
Anglo-Persian Oil Company (Acquisition of Capital) (Amendment) Act 1919
Regimental Debts (Deposit of Wills) (Scotland) Act 1919
items.description: An Act to make provision with regard to wills deposited under section twenty-one of the Regimental Debts Act, 1893, with the Commissary Clerk of the County of Edinburgh, and required for the purpose of confirmation as executor or of completing a title to heritable estate in Scotland.

items.title: Ministry of Agriculture and Fisheries Act 1919
items.description: An Act to provide for the constitution of a Ministry of Agriculture and Fisheries and of Councils and Committees in connection with agriculture, and to amend the Board of Agriculture and Fisheries Acts, 1889 to 1909.

items.title: Aliens Restriction (Amendment) Act 1919
items.description: An Act to continue and extend the provisions of the Aliens Restriction Act, 1914.

items.title: Land Settlement (Scotland) Act 1919
items.description: An Act to make further provision for the acquisition of land for the purposes of Small Holdings, Reclamation, and Drainage, and other purposes relating to Agriculture in Scotland, to amend the Small Landholders (Scotland) Act, 1911, and the enactments relating to Allotments, and otherwise to facilitate land settlement in Scotland.

items.title: Civil List Act 1936 (repealed 5.11.1993)
items.description: An Act to make provision for the honour and dignity of the Crown and the Royal Family, and for the payment of certain salaries, allowances and pensions; to enable His Majesty to assent to arrangements on behalf of any son of His Majesty being Duke of Cornwall for the payment of certain sums out of the revenues of the Duchy during the minority of the said Duke; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Voluntary Hospitals (Paying Patients) Act 1936
items.description: An Act to empower voluntary hospitals in pursuance of Orders of the Charity Commissioners to provide accommodation and treatment for paying patients.

items.title: Government of India Act 1935 (repealed 19.11.1998)
items.description: An Act to make further provision for the government of India.

items.title: Hours of Employment (Conventions) Act 1936 (repealed 1.4.1996)
items.description: An Act to carry out certain draft International Conventions relating to the employment of women during the night and to hours of work in automatic sheet-glass works, to amend the law relating to the hours of employment of women holding responsible positions of management who are not ordinarily engaged in manual work, and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Employment of Women and Young Persons Act 1936
Land Registration Act 1936
items.description: An Act to amend the procedure under the Land Registration Act, 1925, for the making of orders declaring the registration of title to land to be compulsory on sale; to provide for the partial closing of, and otherwise amend the law with respect to, the Middlesex Deeds Registry; to amend subsection (4) of section seventy-five of the Land Registration Act, 1925; to amend the law with respect to the Insurance Fund established under the Land Transfer Act, 1897, and the fees payable under the Land Registration Act, 1925; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Petroleum (Transfer of Licences) Act 1936 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to make provision with respect to the transfer of petroleum-spirit licences granted under the Petroleum (Consolidation) Act, 1928.

items.title: Retail Meat Dealers' Shops (Sunday Closing) Act 1936
Widows', Orphans' and Old Age Contributory Pensions Act 1936
Firearms (Amendment) Act 1936
items.description: An Act to amend the Firearms Act, 1920, and the Firearms Act, 1934, and in connection therewith to amend subsection (2) of section five of the Firearms and Imitation Firearms (Criminal Use) Act, 1933

items.title: Tithe Act 1936
items.description: An Act to extinguish tithe rentcharge and extraordinary tithe rentcharge, and to make provision with respect to the compensation of the owners thereof and rating authorities and to the liabilities of the owners of land charged therewith in respect of the extinguishment thereof; to reduce the rate at which tithe rentcharge is to be payable pending its extinguishment and to make provision with respect to the recovery of arrears thereof; to make provision for the redemption and extinguishment of corn rents and similar payments; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Crown Lands Act 1936
items.description: An Act to provide for the vesting in the Commissioners of Works of certain Crown lands in Westminster as a site for public offices and police offices, to amend the law with respect to other Crown lands, to amend the Crown Lands Acts, 1829 to 1927, and the Public Offices (Sites) Act, 1912, and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Health Resorts and Watering Places Act 1936
Public Health Act 1936
items.description: An Act to consolidate with amendments certain enactments relating to public health

items.title: Private Legislation Procedure (Scotland) Act 1936
items.description: An Act to consolidate the enactments relating to the procedure for obtaining parliamentary powers by way of Provisional Orders in matters affecting Scotland.

items.title: Weights and Measures, Sale of Coal (Scotland) Act 1936
Irish Free State (Consequential Provisions) Act 1922
items.description: An Act to make such provisions as are consequential on or incidental to the establishment of the Irish Free State.

items.title: Trade Facilities and Loans Guarantee Act 1922
Population (Statistics) Act 1938
items.description: An Act to make further provision for obtaining statistical information with respect to the population of Great Britain; and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Superannuation (Various Services) Act 1938
items.description: An Act to extend the powers conferred by certain enactments relating to superannuation so as to include power to grant the like superannuation benefits, and to permit the like allocation of superannuation benefits to spouses and dependants, as could be granted or permitted in respect of persons in the Civil Service of the State; to provide for distribution without probate of sums not exceeding one hundred pounds due to persons to whom those enactments apply or their legal personal representatives ; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Rating and Valuation (Postponement of Valuations) Act 1938
Trade Marks Act 1938 (repealed 31.10.1994)
items.description: An Act to consolidate the Trade Marks Act, 1905, the Trade Marks Act, 1919, and the Trade Marks (Amendment) Act, 1937.

items.title: Conveyancing Amendment (Scotland) Act 1938
items.description: An Act to amend the law of conveyancing in Scotland.

items.title: Increase of Rent and Mortgage Interest (Restrictions) Act 1938
Evidence Act 1938
items.description: An Act to amend the Law of Evidence.

items.title: National Health Insurance (Juvenile Contributors and Young Persons) Act 1937
Sea Fish Industry Act 1938
items.description: An Act to make provision for the better organisation of the white fish industry; to amend the Sea-Fishing Industry Act, 1933, the Whaling Industry (Regulation) Act, 1934, Part IV of the Merchant Shipping Act, 1894, and other enactments relating to sea fisheries; and to make provision for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Scottish Land Court Act 1938
items.description: An Act to make provision with regard to the tenure of office and superannuation of members of the Scottish Land Court.

items.title: Prevention and Treatment of Blindness (Scotland) Act 1938
Leasehold Property (Repairs) Act 1938
items.description: An Act to amend the law as to the enforcement by landlords of obligations to repair and similar obligations arising under leases.

items.title: Infanticide Act 1938
items.description: An Act to repeal and re-enact with modifications the provisions of the Infanticide Act, 1922.

items.title: Welsh Church (Amendment) Act 1938
items.description: An Act to amend paragraph (b) of subsection (1) of section nineteen of the Welsh Church Act, 1914.

items.title: Essential Commodities Reserves Act 1938
items.description: An Act to enable the Board of Trade to obtain information as to commodities which in the opinion of the Board would be essential for the vital needs of the community in the event of war and to make provision for the maintenance of reserves of such commodities; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Coal Act 1938
items.description: An Act to make provision for the acquisition of the property in all unworked coal and mines of coal and in certain associated minerals, and of certain associated property and rights in land, by a Commission with power of management thereover; for amending the enactments relating to facilities for the working of minerals; for empowering the Commission to promote a reduction in the number of coal-mining undertakings; for continuing Part I of the Coal Mines Act, 1930, and for amending the provisions thereof with respect to committees of investigation; for enabling land to be acquired compulsorily for the purposes of the miners welfare committee; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Architects Registration Act 1938 (repealed 21.7.1997)
items.description: An Act to restrict the use of the name Architect to Registered Architects and to extend the time within which practising architects may apply for registration.

items.title: Imperial Telegraphs Act 1938
items.description: An Act to enable the Treasury and the Postmaster-General to carry out certain arrangements made by His Majesty's Government in the United Kingdom with Cable and Wireless Limited, and in connection with those arrangements to amend the law with respect to the calculation of the Post Office net surplus ; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Rating And Valuation (Air–Raid Works) (Scotland) Act 1938
items.description: An Act to provide for relief from rates in respect of air-raid protection works in Scotland.

items.title: Holidays With Pay Act 1938 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to enable wage regulating authorities to make provision for holidays and holiday remuneration for workers whose wages they regulate, and to enable the Minister of Labour to assist voluntary schemes for securing holidays with pay for workers in any industry.

items.title: Nursing Homes Registration (Scotland) Act 1938 (Repealed)
items.description: An Act to provide for the registration and inspection of nursing homes in Scotland and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: House of Commons (Redistribution of Seats) Act 1947
Appellate Jurisdiction Act 1947 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to authorise the appointment of additional Lords of Appeal in Ordinary.

items.title: Polish Resettlement Act 1947
items.description: An Act to provide for the application of the Royal Warrant as to pensions, etc., for the military forces to certain Polish forces, to enable the Assistance Board to meet the needs of, and to provide accommodation in camps or other establishments for, certain Poles and others associated with Polish forces, to provide for their requirements as respects health and educational services, to provide for making arrangements and meeting expenses in connection with their emigration, to modify as respects the Polish resettlement forces and past members of certain Polish forces provisions relating to the service of aliens in the forces of the Crown, to provide for the discipline and internal administration of certain Polish forces and to affirm the operation up to the passing of this Act of provision previously made therefor, and for purposes connected therewith and consequential thereon.

items.title: Civic Restaurants Act 1947
items.description: An Act to empower local authorities to establish and carry on restaurants, and otherwise provide for the supply to the public of meals and refreshments, and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Treaties of Peace (Italy, Roumania, Bulgaria, Hungary and Finland) Act 1947
items.description: An Act to provide for carrying into effect Treaties of Peace between His Majesty and certain other Powers.

items.title: Naval Forces (Enforcement of Maintenance Liabilities) Act 1947 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to authorise deductions under the Naval and Marine Pay and Pensions Act, 1865, for the maintenance of wives and children; to restrict the discontinuance of allotments of pay; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Unemployment and Family Allowances (Northern Ireland Agreement) Act 1946
Indian Independence Act 1947
items.description: An Act to make provision for the setting up in India of two independent Dominions, to substitute other provisions for certain provisions of the Government of India Act,1935 which apply outside those Dominions, and to provide for other matters consequential on or connected with the setting up of those Dominions.

items.title: Foreign Marriage Act 1947
items.description: An Act to amend the Foreign Marriage Act, 1892 and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Finance Act 1947
items.description: An Act to grant certain duties, to alter other duties, and to amend the law relating to the National Debt, the Public Revenue and Savings Banks and to make further provision in connection with Finance.

items.title: Northern Ireland Act 1947
items.description: An Act to enlarge the legislative power of the Parliament of Northern Ireland in respect of certain matters and, in connection therewith, to remove doubts regarding the validity of certain laws made by that Parliament; to validate the Fire Services (Emergency Provisions) Act (Northern Ireland), 1942; to apply Part III of the Requisitioned Land and War Works Act, 1945, to Northern Ireland; to extend section two of the Northern Ireland (Miscellaneous Provisions) Act, 1945 ; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Statistics of Trade Act 1947
items.description: An Act to enable certain government departments to obtain more readily the information necessary for the appreciation of economic trends and for the discharge of their functions; to consolidate and amend the law relating to the census of production; to provide for a census of distribution and other services; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Industrial Organisation and Development Act 1947
items.description: An Act to provide for the establishment of development councils to exercise functions for improving or developing the service rendered to the community by industries and for other purposes in relation thereto, for making funds available for .certain purposes in relation to industries for which there is no development council, for the disposal of any surplus of funds levied under emergency provision for encouragement of exports, for the making of grants to bodies established for the improvement of design, and for purposes connected therewith and consequential thereon.

items.title: Fire Services Act 1947
items.description: An Act to make further provision for fire services in Great Britain; to transfer fire-fighting functions from the National Fire Service to fire brigades maintained by the councils of counties arid county boroughs; to provide for the combination of areas for fire service purposes ; to make further provision for pensions and other awards in respect of persons employed in connection with the provision of fire services; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Acquisition of Land (Authorisation Procedure) (Scotland) Act 1947
items.description: An Act to re-enact in the form in which they apply to Scotland the provisions of the Acquisition of Land (Authorisation Procedure) Act, 1946.

items.title: Local Government (Scotland) Act 1947
items.description: An Act to consolidate with amendments the enactments relating to authorities for the purposes of local government in Scotland.

items.title: Crown Proceedings Act 1947

items.title: Wellington Museum Act 1947

items.title: Companies Act 1947
items.description: An Act to amend the law relating to companies and unit trusts and to dealing in securities, and in connection therewith to amend the law of bankruptcy and the law relating to the registration of business names.

items.title: Agriculture Act 1947
items.description: An Act to make further provision for agriculture.

items.title: Greenwich Hospital Act 1947 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to repeal certain restrictions on the amount of special Greenwich Hospital pensions and of expenditure out of Greenwich Hospital Funds for the education and maintenance of children, and to make further provision for the granting out of those Funds of widows' pensions, children's allowances and gratuities to dependants.

items.title: Town and Country Planning (Scotland) Act 1947
items.description: An Act to make fresh provision with respect to Scotland for planning the development and use of land for the grant of permission to develop land and for other powers of control over the use of land ; to confer on public authorities additional powers in respect of the acquisition and development of land for planning and other purposes, and to amend the law relating to compensation in respect of the compulsory acquisition of land; to provide for payments out of central funds in respect of depreciation occasioned by planning restrictions; to secure the recovery for the benefit of the community of development charges in respect of certain new development;/to provide for the payment of grants out of central funds in respect of expenses of local planning authorities in connection with the matters aforesaid; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Electricity Act 1947
items.description: An Act to provide for the establishment of a British Electricity Authority and Area Electricity Boards and for the exercise and performance by that Authority and those Boards and the North of Scotland Hydro-Electric Board of functions relating to the supply of electricity and certain other matters; for the transfer to the said Authority or any such Board as aforesaid of property, rights, obligations and liabilities of electricity undertakers and other bodies ; to amend the law relating to the supply of electricity ; to make certain consequential provision as to income tax; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Emergency Laws (Miscellaneous Provisions) Act 1947
items.description: An Act to make further provision with respect to the Defence Regulations continued in force by the Emergency Laws- (Transitional Provisions) Act, 1946, and with respect to certain emergency and temporary enactments extended by or contained in that Act; to repeal certain other emergency enactments; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Princess Elizabeth's and Duke of Edinburgh's Annuities Act 1948
Requisitioned Land and War Works Act 1948

items.title: Jersey and Guernsey (Financial Provisions) Act 1947
items.description: An Act to authorise the payment out of the Consolidated Fund to the States of Jersey and Guernsey of amounts equal to sums received in respect of Crown revenues ' accruing in those islands.

items.title: Army and Air Force (Women’s Service) Act 1948 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to enable women to he commissioned and enlisted for service in His Majesty's land and air forces, and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Water Act 1948 (repealed 1.12.1991)

items.title: Local Government Act 1948

items.title: Lord High Commissioner (Church of Scotland) Act 1948
Superannuation (Miscellaneous Provisions) Act 1948
items.description: An Act to amend the law relating to pensions and other similar payments to be made to and in respect of persons who have been in certain employment, and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: House of Commons Members’ Fund Act 1948 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to amend the House of Commons Members' Fund Act, 1939.

items.title: Radioactive Substances Act 1948
items.description: An Act to make provision with respect to radioactive substances and certain apparatus producing radiation.

items.title: Industrial Assurance and Friendly Societies Act 1948 (Repealed)
items.description: An Act to amend the Friendly Societies Acts, 1896 to 1929, and the Industrial Assurance Acts, 1923 to 1929, and to amend provisions corresponding or relating to provisions of those Acts contained in the Industrial and Provident Societies Acts, 1893 to 1928, and other enactments, as to payments on deaths of children, payments on deaths where no grant of probate or administration has been made, investment in savings banks, the designation of auditors appointed thereunder, the mode of determination of disputes and interpretation.

items.title: Education (Miscellaneous Provisions) Act 1948 (repealed 1.11.1996)

items.title: Law Reform (Personal Injuries) Act 1948
items.description: An Act to abolish the defence of common employment, to amend the law relating to the measure of damages for personal injury or death, and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Merchant Shipping Act 1948
items.description: An Act to amend the provisions of the Merchant Shipping Acts relating to matters affected by certain International Conventions adopted at Seattle in the year nineteen hundred and forty-six.

items.title: Agriculture (Scotland) Act 1948

items.title: Agricultural Wages Act 1948

items.title: Finance Act 1948
items.description: An Act to grant certain duties, to alter other duties, and to amend the law relating to the National Debt and the Public Revenue, and to make further provision in connection with Finance.

items.title: Ministers of the Crown (Treasury Secretaries) Act 1947
White Fish and Herring Industries Act 1948
Nurseries and Child-Minders Regulation Act 1948 (repealed 14th October 1991)
items.description: An Act to provide for the regulation of certain nurseries and of persons who for reward receive children into their homes to look after them; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: British Nationality Act 1948
items.description: An Act to make provision for British nationality and for citizenship of the United Kingdom and Colonies and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Public Registers and Records (Scotland) Act 1948

items.title: Criminal Justice Act 1948

items.title: Monopolies and Restrictive Practices (Inquiry and Control) Act 1948
Sri Lanka Independence Act 1947
items.description: An Act to make provision for, and in connection with, the attainment by Ceylon of fully responsible status within the British Commonwealth of Nations.

items.title: Mandated and Trust Territories Act 1947
items.description: An Act to make provision as to the application and modification of enactments in relation to mandates of the League of Nations and the trusteeship system of the United Nations.

items.title: Colonial Stock Act 1948 (repealed 19.11.1998)
items.description: An Act to enable stock to which the Colonial Stock Act 1877 applies to be made transferable by instrument in writing, and to provide for the extension of the Colonial Stock Acts 1877 to 1934 to stock of Governments or authorities established for controlling or administering services or matters of common interest to the inhabitants of more than one of the colonies or territories to whose stock any of the said Acts apply or could be made applicable.

items.title: Law Reform (Miscellaneous Provisions) 1949
items.description: An Act to amend the law relating to divorce and other matrimonial proceedings, the admissibility of evidence as to access, the charge and payment of percentage under the Lunacy Act, 1890, and towards of court; and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Parliament Act 1949
items.description: An Act to amend the Parliament Act, 1911.

items.title: Railway and Canal Commission (Abolition) Act 1949
items.description: An Act to abolish the Railway and Canal Commission and make provision for the future exercise and performance of their functions ; to amend and repeal certain enactments relating to their functions ; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Pensions Appeal Tribunals Act 1949
items.description: An Act to amend the Pensions Appeal Tribunals Act, 1945.

items.title: Savings Banks Act 1949
items.description: An Act to amend the law relating to trustee savings banks, to abolish naval savings banks, to extend the powers of the Postmaster General under section two of the Savings Banks Act, 1904; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Minister of Food (Financial Powers) Act 1949

items.title: National Theatre Act 1949

items.title: American Aid and European Payments (Financial Provisions) Act 1949
Colonial Naval Defence Act 1949 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to make further provision for the naval defence of overseas territories.

items.title: British North America Act 1949
items.description: An Act to confirm and give effect to Terms of Union agreed between Canada and Newfoundland,

items.title: Tenancy of Shops (Scotland) Act 1949
items.description: An Act to make provision with regard to tenancies of shops in Scotland.

items.title: Juries Act 1949

items.title: Consular Conventions Act 1949

items.title: Agricultural Wages (Scotland) Act 1949

items.title: Special Roads Act 1949
items.description: An Act to provide for the construction of roads reserved for special classes of traffic; to amend the law relating to trunk roads; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Consolidation of Enactments (Procedure) Act 1949
items.description: An Act to facilitate the preparation of Bills for the purpose of consolidating the enactments relating to any subject.

items.title: British Film Institute Act 1949
items.description: An Act to provide for the payment to the British Film Institute of grants out of moneys provided by Parliament.

items.title: Agriculture (Miscellaneous Provisions) Act 1949
items.description: An Act to amend the law relating to agriculture, including certain enactments relating to milk and dairies.

items.title: Commonwealth Telegraphs Act 1949
items.description: An Act to give effect to certain provisions of an agreement for promoting and co-ordinating the efficiency and development of the external telegraph services of the Commonwealth, and to make provision for certain matters incidental thereto and for extending the system, heretofore embodied in the arrangement made by the Postmaster General with Cable and Wireless, Limited, in pursuance of subsection (4) of section one of the Imperial Telegraphs Act, 1938, for the sharing of revenue derived from telegrams transmitted to or from places outside the United Kingdom.

items.title: Judges Pensions (India and Burma) Act 1948 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to provide tor the payment out of moneys provided by Parliament of pensions to certain persons who were serving as judges in India before the fifteenth day of August, nineteen hundred and forty-seven, of as judges in Burma before the fourth day of January, nineteen hundred and forty-eight, and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Ireland Act 1949
items.description: An Act to recognise and declare the constitutional position as to the part of Ireland heretofore known as Eire, and to make provision as to the name by which it may be known and the manner in which the law is to apply in relation to it; to declare and affirm the constitutional position and the territorial integrity of Northern Ireland and to amend, as respects the Parliament of the United Kingdom, the law relating to the qualifications of electors in constituencies in Northern Ireland ; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Lands Tribunal Act 1949
items.description: An Act to establish new tribunals to determine in place of official arbitrators and others certain questions relating to compensation for the compulsory acquisition of land and other matters, to amend the Acquisition of Land (Assessment of Compensation) Act, 1919, with respect to the failure to deliver a notice of claim, and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Merchant Shipping (Safety Convention) Act 1949
items.description: An Act to enable effect to be given to an International Convention for the Safety of Life at Sea, signed in London on the tenth day of June, nineteen hundred and forty-eight; to amend the provisions of the Merchant Shipping Acts, 1894 to 1948, relating to the construction of passenger steamers, to life-saving appliances, wireless and radio navigational aids and to other matters affected by the said Convention, and to amend the provisions of those Acts relating to fees.

items.title: U.S.A. Veterans’ Pensions (Administration) Act 1949 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to provide for the administration by the Minister of Pensions of veterans' pensions and other sums payable under the law of the United States of America in respect of certain persons; and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: House of Commons (Indemnification of Certain Members) Act 1949
Finance Act 1949
items.description: An Act to grant certain duties, to alter other duties, and to amend the law relating to the National Debt and the Public Revenue (other than Purchase Tax), and to make further provision in connection with Finance.

items.title: Civil Defence Act 1948 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to make further provision for civil defence.

items.title: Coal Industry Act 1949
items.description: An Act to alter the composition of the National Coal Board, extend the area within which their activities may be carried on, empower them to terminate certain long-term contracts and provide for the enforcement against them of certain workmen’s compensation liabilities; to amend sections thirty-seven and sixty-four of the Coal Industry Nationalisation Act 1946, and authorise the making of certain payments in connection with the settlement of disputes arising under regulations made under the said section thirty-seven and to repeal the provisions of that Act imposing restrictions on the disposal of government stock issued for compensation to companies; to extend the power of the Minister of Fuel and Power to make general regulations under section eighty-six of the Coal Mines Act 1911, and otherwise to amend that section; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Wireless Telegraphy Act 1949 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to amend the law relating to wireless telegraphy.

items.title: Prevention of Damage by Pests Act 1949
items.description: An Act to re-enact with modifications the Rats and Mice (Destruction) Act, 1919; to make permanent provision for preventing loss of food by infestation; and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: House of Commons (Redistribution of Seats) Act 1949
New Forest Act 1949
items.description: An Act to make further provision as respects the New Forest in the county of Southampton.

items.title: Docking and Nicking of Horses Act 1949
items.description: An Act to restrict the docking and nicking of horses and the importation of docked horses.

items.title: Coast Protection Act 1949
items.description: An Act to amend the law relating to the protection of the coast of Great Britain against erosion and encroachment by the sea; to provide for the- restriction and removal of works detrimental to navigation; to transfer the management of Crown foreshore from the Minister of Transport to the Commissioners of Crown Lands; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Agricultural Holdings (Scotland) Act 1949 (repealed 25.9.1991)
items.description: An Act to consolidate the Agricultural Holdings (Scotland) Act, 1923, Part II of the Small Landholders and Agricultural Holdings (Scotland) Act, 1931, Part I of the Agriculture (Scotland) Act, 1948, and certain other enactments relating to agricultural holdings, save, with respect to rights to compensation, in their application to certain cases determined by past events.

items.title: Marriage Act 1949
items.description: An Act to consolidate certain enactments relating to the solemnization and registration of marriages in England with such corrections and improvements as may be authorised under the Consolidation of Enactments (Procedure) Act, 1949.

items.title: Armed Forces (Housing Loans) Act 1949
items.description: An Act to provide money for the provision of housing accommodation in Great Britain for married persons serving in, or employed in connection with, the armed forces of the Crown, and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Married Women (Restraint upon Anticipation) Act 1949
items.description: An Act to render inoperative any restriction upon anticipation or alienation attached to the enjoyment of property by a woman.

items.title: Recall of Army and Air Force Pensioners Act 1948
British North America (No. 2) Act 1949
items.description: An Act to amend the British North America Act, 1867, as respects the amendment of the Constitution of Canada.

items.title: Distribution of German Enemy Property Act 1949
items.description: An Act to provide for the collection and realisation of German enemy property and for the distribution of the proceeds thereof; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Patents Act 1949
items.description: An Act to consolidate certain enactments relating to patents.

items.title: Registered Designs Act 1949
items.description: An Act to consolidate certain enactments relating to registered designs.

items.title: India (Consequential Provision) Act 1949
items.description: An Act to make provision as to the operation of the law in relation to India, and persons and things in any way belonging to or connected with India, in view of India's becoming a Republic while remaining a member of the Commonwealth.

items.title: National Health Service (Amendment) Act 1949
items.description: An Act to amend the National Health Service Act, 1946, and the National Health Service (Scotland) Act, 1947, and otherwise to amend the law in relation to services provided under the said Acts.

items.title: Criminal Justice (Scotland) Act 1949 (Repealed 1.4.1996)
items.description: An Act to amend the law of Scotland relating to the probation of offenders, and the powers of courts under the Children and Young Persons (Scotland) Act, 1937; to abolish certain punishments and obsolete sanctions, and otherwise to reform existing methods and provide new methods of dealing with offenders; to alter the law relating to the proceedings of criminal courts in Scotland; to amend the False Oaths (Scotland) Act, 1933 to regulate the management of prisons and other institutions in Scotland and the treatment of offenders and other persons committed to custody; to make certain consequential amendments to the Criminal Justice Act, 1948; and for purposes connected with the aforesaid matters.

items.title: National Parks and Access to the Countryside Act 1949
items.description: An Act to make provision for National Parks and the establishment of a National Parks Commission ; to confer on the Nature Conservancy and local authorities powers for the establishment and maintenance of nature reserves; to make further provision for the recording, creation, maintenance and improvement of public paths and for securing access to open country, and to amend the law relating to rights of way; to confer further powers for preserving and enhancing natural beauty; and for matters connected with the purposes aforesaid.

items.title: Adoption of Children Act 1949 (repealed 5.11.1993)
items.description: An Act to amend the law relating to the adoption of children; and for related purposes.

items.title: Livestock Rearing Act 1951
items.description: An Act to extend and amend the provisions of the Hill Farming Act, 1946, relating to the rehabilitation of hill farming land, the payment of subsidies in respect of hill sheep and hill cattle and the control of rams in England and Wales; to make fresh provision with respect to the exercise of the functions under that Act of the Minister of Agriculture and Fisheries and the Secretary of State ; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Salmon and Freshwater Fisheries (Protection) (Scotland) Act 1951 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to amend the law in regard to the protection of salmon and freshwater fish in Scotland, including the whole of the River Tweed, and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Fire Services Act 1951 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to amend sections twenty-six and twenty-seven of the Fire Services Act, 1947.

items.title: Reverend J. G. MacManaway's Indemnity Act 1951
Sea Fish Industry Act 1951
items.description: An Act to make provision for the reorganization, development and regulation of the white fish industry ; to amend the law relating to fishery harbours, the catching and landing of sea fish and other matters affecting or connected with the sea fishing and whaling industries; to abolish the Scottish Fisheries Advisory Council; and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: British North America Act 1951
items.description: An Act to amend the British North America Act, 1867.

items.title: Fraudulent Mediums Act 1951 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to repeal the Witchcraft Act, 1735, and to make, in substitution for certain provisions of section four of the Vagrancy Act, 1824, express provision for the punishment of persons who fraudulently purport to act as, spiritualistic mediums or to exercise powers of telepathy, clairvoyance or other similar powers.

items.title: Pet Animals Act 1951
items.description: An Act to regulate the sale of pet animals.

items.title: Common Informers Act 1951
items.description: An Act to abolish the common informer procedure.

items.title: Finance Act 1951
items.description: An Act to grant certain duties, to alter other duties, and to amend the law with respect to the National Debt (including the Sinking Funds therefor), Customs and Inland Revenue (including Excise).

items.title: Rural Water Supplies and Sewerage Act 1951
Courts–Martial (Appeals) Act 1951
items.description: An Act to establish a Courts-Martial Appeal Court and provide for appeals thereto from courts-martial and certain naval disciplinary courts; to make provision with respect to the offices of Judge Advocate of His Majesty's Fleet and Judge Advocate General; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Consolidated Fund (Civil List Provisions) Act 1951 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to complete the charge on the Consolidated Fund of the provisions made by the Civil List Act, 1937.

items.title: Nurses (Scotland) Act 1951 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to consolidate certain enactments relating to nurses for the sick in Scotland.

items.title: Guardianship and Maintenance of Infants Act 1951
National Assistance (Amendment) Act 1951
items.description: An Act to amend section forty-seven of the National Assistance Act, 1948.

items.title: Fireworks Act 1951
items.description: An Act to confer powers of seizure where dangerous fireworks are found, and powers to determine or amend licences or certificates for explosives factories where fireworks are made, to make provision for the marking of fireworks and containers in which fireworks are kept and to amend the law relating to licences for small firework factories; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Price Control and Other Orders (Indemnity) Act 1951
Mineral Workings Act 1951
items.description: An Act to establish a fund for the purpose of financing the restoration of land in England used for the working of ironstone by opencast operations and to provide for payments to and from that fund; to make provision for the reclamation, cultivation, afforestation or other treatment of such land; to provide for setting off the development charge in respect of certain minerals against payments under Part VI of the Town and Country Planning Act, 1947, or Part V of the Town and Country Planning (Scotland) Act, 1947, in respect of interests therein, for the modification of certain mining leases and orders granting working rights, and for the application of section eighty-one of the Town and Country Planning Act, 1947, and section seventy-eight of the Town and Country Planning (Scotland) Act, 1947, to certain minerals of the National Coal Board; to authorise the temporary stopping up or diversion of highways for the purpose of working minerals by opencast operations; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Tithe Act 1951
items.description: An Act to provide, in lieu of the obligation imposed by the Tithe Act, 1936, to register all annuities charged thereby, for registration in selected districts, to amend and to repeal certain provisions of that Act, and to make further provision with respect to certain matters connected therewith.

items.title: Rag Flock and Other Filling Materials Act 1951 (repealed 6.1.1997)
items.description: An Act to secure the use of clean filling materials in upholstered articles and other articles which are stuffed or lined, and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Rivers (Prevention of Pollution) Act 1951
items.description: An Act to make new provision for maintaining or restoring the wholesomeness of the rivers and other inland or coastal waters of England and Wales in place of the Rivers Pollution Prevention Act, 1876, and certain other enactments ; and to provide for laying before Parliament the annual reports of river boards.

items.title: Reserve and Auxiliary Forces (Protection of Civil Interests) Act 1951
items.description: An Act to provide for protecting the interests of persons called up or volunteering for certain naval, military or air force service, or doing work or training under the National Service Act 1948, by virtue of being conditionally registered under that Act as conscientious objectors, and of other persons consequentially affected, in respect of civil rights and liabilities of theirs.

items.title: Rivers (Prevention of Pollution) (Scotland) Act 1951 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to provide for establishing river purification boards in Scotland and for conferring on or transferring to such boards functions relating to the prevention of river pollution; to make new provision for maintaining or restoring the cleanliness of the rivers and other inland waters and the tidal waters of Scotland in place of the Rivers Pollution Prevention Act, 1876, and certain other enactments; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Restoration of Pre-War Trade Practices Act 1950
Royal Patriotic Fund Corporation Act 1950
items.description: An Act to make further provision as respects the application of certain funds under the management of the Royal Patriotic Fund Corporation.

items.title: Public Registers and Records (Scotland) Act 1950
items.description: An Act to amend the law of Scotland with regard to the signing of certificates of recording in the Register of Sasines.

items.title: Foreign Compensation Act 1950
items.description: An Act to provide for the establishment of a Commission for the purpose of registering and determining claims to participate in compensation under agreements with foreign Governments and of distributing any compensation received under any such agreements, and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Finance Act 1950
items.description: An Act to grant certain duties and alter other duties, to make certain amendments of the law relating to purchase tax, to amend the law relating to other branches of the public revenue or to the National Debt, and to make further provision in connection with Finance.

items.title: Colonial and Other Territories (Divorce Jurisdiction) Act 1950
Arbitration Act 1950
items.description: An Act to consolidate the Arbitration Acts, 1889 to 1934.

items.title: Shops Act 1950 (repealed 1.12.1994)
items.description: An Act to consolidate the Shops Acts, 1912 to 1938, and certain other enactments relating to shops.

items.title: Allotments Act 1950
items.description: An Act to amend the law relating to allotments and to abolish restrictions on the keeping of hens and rabbits.

items.title: Food and Drugs (Milk, Dairies and Artificial Cream) Act 1950
Maintenance Orders Act 1950
items.description: An Act to enable certain maintenance orders and other orders relating to married persons and children to be made and enforced throughout the United Kingdom.

items.title: Allotments (Scotland) Act 1950 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to amend the law relating to allotments in Scotland.

items.title: Public Utilities Street Works Act 1950 (repealed 1.1.1993)
items.description: [An Act to enact uniform provisions for regulating relations as to apparatus in streets between authorities, bodies and persons having statutory powers to place and deal with apparatus therein, and those having the control or management of streets and others concerned in the exercise of such powers; to render such powers exercisable in land which abuts on a street and is destined for use for road purposes; to make further provision for regulating the closing or restriction of use of roads for the purposes of works and as to the use of alternative routes; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid].

items.title: High Court and County Court (Judges) Act 1950
Merchant Shipping Act 1950
items.description: An Act to provide for regulating crew accommodation in fishing boats and for amending the Merchant Shipping Acts, 1894 to 1949, with respect to the engagement and discharge of crews, the review of punishments imposed by naval courts, fishing boats engaged in the Newfoundland cod fisheries, and proceedings in summary courts in Northern Ireland; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Government and Other Stocks (Emergency Provisions) Act 1939
items.description: An Act to make temporary provision for rendering inscribed stocks transferable by instrument in writing, and for extending, in certain circumstances arising from war, the time limited by the National Debt Act, 1870, for the payment of coupons.

items.title: Exchequer and Audit Departments (Temporary Provisions) Act 1939
Liability for War Damage (Miscellaneous Provisions) Act 1939
items.description: An Act to modify certain rights and liabilities with respect to goods lost or damaged by war.

items.title: Police and Firemen (War Service) Act 1939 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to make provision with respect to constables I and firemen serving in His Majesty's forces during the period of the present emergency, to suspend the right of constables and firemen to retire on pension during that period, to provide that war injuries shall be deemed to be non-accidental injuries for the purpose of enactments and other instruments relating to the pensions of constables and firemen, to amend section sixteen of the Fire Brigade Pensions Act, 1925, and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Administration of Justice (Emergency Provisions) (Northern Ireland) Act 1939
Patents, Designs, Copyright and Trade Marks (Emergency) Act
items.description: An Act to make such special provision with respect to patents, registered designs, copyright and trade marks, as is expedient to meet any emergency which may arise as a result of war.

items.title: Possession of Mortgaged Land (Emergency Provisions) Act 1939
Local Elections and Register of Electors (Temporary Provisions) Act 1939
National Loans Act 1939 (c.117)
items.description: An Act to confer on the Treasury powers to raise money and exchange securities, and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Chartered and Other Bodies (Temporary Provisions) Act 1939
Restriction of Advertisement (War Risks Insurance) Act 1939
items.description: An Act to restrict the distribution of circulars, and the publication of advertisements, relating to the insurance of property against war risks, to provide for the imposition of certain conditions and requirements in cases where permission for such distribution or publication is granted, and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Official Secrets Act 1939 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to amend section six of the Official Secrets Act, 1920.

items.title: Cancer Act 1939
items.description: An Act to make further provision for the treatment of cancer, to authorise the Minister of Health to lend money to the National Radium Trust, to prohibit certain advertisements relating to cancer, and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Wild Birds (Duck and Geese) Protection Act 1939
Reorganisation of Offices (Scotland) Act 1939
items.description: An Act to provide for the transference of the functions of Scottish government departments to the Secretary of State, to make provision for the reorganisation of the General Board of Control for Scotland, and for purposes connected with the aforesaid matters.

items.title: Camps Act 1939
items.description: An Act to promote and facilitate the construction, maintenance and management of camps of a permanent character.

items.title: Civil Defence Act 1939 (Repealed)
items.description: An Act to make further provision for civil defence and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Patents and Designs (Limits of Time) Act 1939
Marriage Act 1939
items.description: An Act to facilitate marriages in cases where one party resides in Scotland and the other in England and to make further provision as respects notices of marriage between parties one of whom resides in Scotland or England.

items.title: Finance Act 1939
items.description: An Act to grant certain duties of Customs and Inland Revenue (including Excise), to alter other duties, and to amend the law relating to Customs and Inland Revenue (including Excise) and the National Debt, and to make further provision in connection with finance.

items.title: Prevention of Damage by Rabbits Act 1939
items.description: An Act to make provision for the prevention of damage by rabbits; and to amend the law relating to the use of poison and the use of spring traps above ground for the purpose of killing hares or rabbits.

items.title: House to House Collections Act 1939
items.description: An Act to provide for the regulation of house to house collections for charitable purposes; and for matters connected therewith.

items.title: House of Commons Members’ Fund Act 1939 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to provide for the making, in certain cases, of grants to, and to the widows and to the children of, persons who have been members of the House of Commons; and for purposes connected with the matter aforesaid.

items.title: Public Trustee (General Deposit Fund) Act 1939
items.description: An Act to amend the law with respect to the manner in which the public trustee may deal with certain trust moneys, to confirm the legality of certain dealings by the public trustee with such moneys and to require certain moneys in the hands of the public trustee to be paid into the Exchequer; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Air Ministry (Heston and Kenley Aerodromes Extension) Act 1939
Prize Act 1939
items.description: An Act to apply prize law to aircraft; to amend and explain the enactments relating to prize; and to provide for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Import, Export and Customs Powers (Defence) Act 1939
items.description: An Act to provide for controlling the importation, exportation and carriage coastwise of goods and the shipment of goods as ships' stores; to provide for facilitating the enforcement of the law relating to the matters aforesaid and the law relating to trading with the enemy; and to provide for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid,

items.title: Rent and Mortgage Interest Restrictions Act 1939
Landlord and Tenant (War Damage) Act 1939
items.description: An Act to modify the rights and liabilities of landlords, tenants and other persons interested in land damaged by war.

items.title: Essential Buildings and Plant (Repair of War Damage) Act 1939
Compensation (Defence) Act 1939
items.description: An Act to provide for compensation in respect of action taken on behalf of His Majesty in the exercise of certain emergency powers; and for purposes connected with the matter aforesaid.

items.title: Ministers of the Crown (Emergency Appointments) Act 1939
War Damage to Land (Scotland) Act 1939
items.description: An Act to modify the rights and liabilities of persons interested in land in Scotland damaged by war.

items.title: Personal Injuries (Emergency Provisions) Act 1939
items.description: An Act to make provision as respects certain personal injuries sustained during the period of the present emergency.

items.title: Pensions (Navy, Army, Air Force and Mercantile Marine) Act 1939
items.description: An Act to make provision for the transfer to the Minister of Pensions of powers and duties with respect to pensions and grants vested in certain Naval, Military and Air Force authorities, to amend section nine of the War Pensions (Administrative Provisions) Act, 1918, to make provision for awards in respect of war injuries to, and the detention of, mariners and other seafaring persons and war damage to their effects, and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: National Health Insurance and Contributory Pensions (Emergency Provisions) Act 1939
House of Commons (Service in His Majesty's Forces) Act 1939
Trading with the Enemy Act
items.description: An Act to impose penalties for trading with the enemy, to make provision as respects the property of enemies and enemy subjects, and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Military and Air Forces (Prolongation of Service) Act 1939
Education (Scotland) (War Service Superannuation) Act 1939
items.description: An Act to enable war service to be treated as service under any scheme framed in pursuance of the Education (Scotland) (Superannuation) Acts, 1919 to 1937.

items.title: Industrial Assurance and Friendly Societies (Emergency Protection from Forfeiture) Act 1940
Rating and Valuation (Postponement of Valuations) Act 1940
Old Age and Widows’ Pensions Act 1940
Agriculture (Miscellaneous War Provisions) Act 1940 (repealed 5.11.1993)
items.description: An Act to make certain amendments in the law relating to agriculture and agricultural land in connection with the present war.

items.title: Superannuation Schemes (War Service) Act 1940
items.description: An Act to enable provision to be made for preventing loss of benefits under certain superannuation schemes by persons undertaking service in the forces or employment for war purposes.

items.title: Evidence and Powers of Attorney Act 1940
items.description: An Act to empower certain officers and other persons to administer oaths and take affidavits, to facilitate the proof in criminal proceedings of documents intercepted in the post, and to make further provision as respects powers of attorney.

items.title: Finance Act 1940
items.description: An Act to grant certain duties of Customs and Inland Revenue (including Excise), to alter other duties, and to amend the law relating to Customs and Inland Revenue (including Excise) and the National Debt, and to make further provision in connection with Finance.

items.title: War Charities Act 1940 (repealed 1.9.1992)
items.description: An Act to provide for the registration and control of war charities, and for the extension of the objects of certain war charities; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Middlesex Deeds Act 1940
items.description: An Act to provide for the closing for all purposes of the Middlesex Deeds Register, and for granting indemnities in respect of losses which may arise from the closing thereof; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Indian and Colonial Divorce Jurisdiction Act 1940
British North America Act 1940
items.description: An Act to include unemployment insurance among the classes of subjects enumerated in section ninety-one of the British North America Act, 1867.

items.title: Law Reform (Miscellaneous Provisions) (Scotland) Act 1940
items.description: An Act to amend the law of Scotland relating to enforcement of decrees ad factum praestandum, to solatium and damages, to contribution among joint wrongdoers, and to prorogation of the jurisdiction of the Sheriff Court; to amend and extend the Intestate Husband’s Estate (Scotland) Acts, 1911 and 1919; to make provision regarding the powers of the King’s and Lord Treasurer’s Remembrancer; to enable effect to be given to International Conventions affecting Scottish Courts; and to amend the law of Scotland relating to criminal procedure.

items.title: Agriculture (Miscellaneous War Provisions) (No. 2) Act 1940 (repealed 5.11.1993)
items.description: An Act to make certain amendments in the law relating to agriculture and agricultural land in connection with the present war.

items.title: Gas and Steam Vehicles (Excise Duties) Act 1940
Trade Boards and Road Haulage Wages (Emergency Provisions) Act 1940
Air Raid Precaution (Postponement of Financial Investigations) Act 1941
Land Drainage (Scotland) Act 1941  (repealed)
items.description: An Act to make further provision for the drainage of agricultural land in Scotland.

items.title: Chartered and Other Bodies (Temporary Provisions) Act 1941
Public and Other Schools (War Conditions) Act 1941
Local Elections and Register of Electors (Temporary Provisions) Act 1940
War Damage (Extension of Risk Period) Act 1941
National Health Insurance, Contributory Pensions and Workmen's Compensation Act 1941
Naval and Marine Forces (Temporary Release from Service) Act 1940
War Damage to Land (Scotland) Act 1941
items.description: An Act to make further provision with regard to the rights of landlords and tenants of lands and heritages in Scotland which have sustained war damage and to obligations to insure against war damage to such lands and heritages and to amend the War Damage to Land (Scotland) Act, 1939.

items.title: Landlord and Tenant (War Damage) (Amendment) Act 1941
items.description: An Act to amend the Landlord and Tenant (War Damage) Act, 1939.

items.title: India and Burma (Postponement of Elections) Act 1941
Marriage (Members of His Majesty's Forces) Act 1941
Local Elections and Register of Electors (Temporary Provisions) Act 1941
Agriculture (Miscellaneous Provisions) Act 1941 (repealed 5.11.1993)
items.description: An Act to amend the law relating to agriculture (including bee-keeping) and agricultural land.

items.title: House of Commons Disqualification (Temporary Provisions) Act 1941
Ministers of the Crown and House of Commons Disqualification Act 1942
Landlord and Tenant (Requisitioned Land) Act 1942
items.description: An Act to provide for the disclaimer of leases comprising land of which possession has been taken in the exercise of emergency powers, for the adjustment of the rights of the parties to such leases with respect to certain buildings and fixtures, for the reduction in certain cases of the rent and other periodical sums payable under or in connection with leases comprising such land, for requiring the continuance, after possession of such land has been taken as aforesaid, of certain services, provided by the landlord, and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Anglo-Venezuelan Treaty (Island of Patos) Act 1942 (Repealed 8.11.1995)
items.description: An Act to approve a Treaty signed on behalf of His Majesty and on behalf of the President of the United States of Venezuela relating to the Island of Patos.

items.title: Finance Act 1942
items.description: An Act to grant certain duties, to alter other duties, and to amend the law relating to the Public Revenue and the National Debt, and to make further provision in connection with Finance.

items.title: Minister of Works Act 1942
items.description: An Act to make provision in connection with the appointment of a Minister of Works . . . to provide for the transfer to that Minister of the functions and property of the Commissioners of Works and of the functions and property of the Commissioners of Public Works in Ireland, . . . and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Pensions (Mercantile Marine) Act 1942
items.description: An Act to amend the Pensions (Navy, Army, Air Force and Mercantile Marine) Act, 1939, as respects mariners and other seafaring persons; to explain the meaning of "physical injury" in that Act and in the Personal Injuries (Emergency Provisions) Act, 1939, and to make a consequential amendment of section three of the last-mentioned Act.

items.title: United States of America (Visiting Forces) Act 1942
Greenwich Hospital Act 1942
items.description: An Act to extend the powers of the Admiralty under section twenty of the Greenwich Hospital Act, 1865, with respect to the grant and allocation of pensions and pecuniary benefits in the case of persons employed for the purposes of Greenwich Hospital and otherwise to amend the said section; to provide, on the death of any such persons, for the distribution without probate or other proof of title of sums not exceeding one hundred pounds due to those persons or to their legal personal representatives; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Local Elections and Register of Electors (Temporary Provisions) Act 1942
India and Burma (Temporary and Miscellaneous Provisions) Act 1942
Welsh Courts Act 1942 (repealed 21.12.1993)
items.description: An Act to repeal section seventeen of the statute 27 Hen. 8. c. 26, to remove doubt as to the right of Welsh speaking persons to testify in the Welsh language in courts of justice in Wales, and to enable rules to be made for the administration of oaths and affirmations in that language, and for the provision, employment, and payment, of interpreters in such courts.

items.title: War Orphans Act 1942
items.description: An Act to amend section nine of the War Pensions (Administrative Provisions) Act, 1918, and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Restoration of Pre-War Trade Practices Act 1942
House of Commons Disqualification (Temporary Provisions) Act 1943
British Nationality and Status of Aliens Act 1943

items.title: Agriculture (Miscellaneous Provisions) Act 1943
items.description: An Act to amend the law relating to agriculture, agricultural land and the drainage of land, and to amend the Corn Returns Act, 1882.

items.title: Evidence and Powers of Attorney Act 1943
items.description: An Act to amend the Evidence and Powers of Attorney Act, 1940, to provide for the proof of notarial acts of certain foreign, diplomatic and consular representatives, and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Settled Land and Trustee Acts (Court’s General Powers) Act 1943
items.description: An Act to extend temporarily the powers of the court under section sixty-four of the Settled Land Act, 1925, and section fifty-seven of the Trustee Act, 1925; and to amend the first-mentioned section as respects improvements.

items.title: Pensions and Determination of Needs Act 1943
Town and Country Planning (Interim Development) Act 1943
Restriction of Ribbon Development (Temporary Development) Act 1943
Emergency Powers (Isle of Man Defence) Act 1943
Coal Act 1943
items.description: An Act to amend the Coal Act, 1938, and dissolve the "Coal Mines National Industrial Board.

items.title: Pensions Appeal Tribunals Act 1943
items.description: An Act to provide for the bringing of appeals against the rejection by the Minister of Pensions on certain grounds of-claims in respect of incapacity for work, disablement or death arising out of the war and against certain other decisions of the Minister of Pensions affecting awards in respect of such claims ; to give a statutory right to sums payable under such awards ; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Law Reform (Frustrated Contracts) Act 1943
items.description: An Act to amend the law relating to the frustration of contracts.

items.title: Regency Act 1943
items.description: An Act to amend the law as to the delegation of royal functions to Counsellors of State.

items.title: Town and Country Planning (Interim Development) (Scotland) Act 1943
Rent of Furnished Houses Control (Scotland) Act 1943
Price Control (Regulation of Disposal of Stocks) Act 1943
Parliament (Elections and Meeting) Act 1943
items.description: An Act to make temporary provision as respects parliamentary elections and the registration of parliamentary electors and, in connection therewith, as respects the dissolution of parliament as from a future date and other matters; to consolidate and amend the law as to the officers to whom writs for parliamentary elections are to be directed, and the persons to whom and the manner in which they are to be conveyed; and to shorten the time required for summoning parliament when prorogued.

items.title: Minister of Town and Country Planning Act 1943
Universities and Colleges (Trusts) Act 1943
items.description: An Act to make provision as to trust property held by or on behalf of certain universities and colleges or for purposes connected with those universities and colleges.

items.title: Disabled Persons (Employment) Act 1944
items.description: An Act to make further and better provision for enabling persons handicapped by disablement to secure employment, or work on their own account, and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: House of Commons Disqualification (Temporary Provisions) Act 1944
Public Works Loans Act 1944
items.description: An Act to grant money for the purpose of certain local loans out of the Local Loans Fund and for other purposes relating to local loans, and to enable the functions of the secretary of the Public Works Loan Commissioners to be performed, in the event of his inability to act, by an assistant secretary.

items.title: Local Elections and Register of Electors (Temporary Provisions) Act 1943
Police and Firemen (War Service) Act 1944 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to amend the Police and Firemen (War Service) Act, 1939, and, in connection therewith, to amend certain other enactments.

items.title: Finance Act 1944
items.description: An Act to grant certain duties, to alter other duties, and to amend the law relating to the Public Revenue and the National Debt, and to make further provision in connection with Finance.

items.title: Law Officers Act 1944
items.description: An Act to enable the functions of the Attorney General, of the Lord Advocate and of the Attorney General for Northern Ireland to be discharged respectively by the Solicitor General, by the Solicitor General for Scotland and by deputy in certain cases.

items.title: Rural Water Supplies and Sewerage Act 1944 (repealed 1.4.1996)
items.description: An Act to make provision as to water supplies, sewerage and sewage disposal in rural localities, and to make expenses incurred by rural district councils in connection with water supply, sewerage and sewage disposal general expenses.

items.title: Agriculture (Miscellaneous Provisions) Act 1944 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to provide for the establishment of a National Agricultural Advisory Service, and for increasing the resources of the Agricultural Mortgage Corporation and the Scottish Agricultural Securities Corporation, arid otherwise to amend the law relating to agriculture and matters connected therewith.

items.title: Food and Drugs (Milk and Dairies) Act 1944
Education Act 1944 (repealed 1.11.1996)
items.description: An Act to reform the law relating to education in England and Wales.

items.title: House of Commons (Redistribution of Seats) Act 1944
Landlord and Tenant (Requisitioned Land) Act 1944
items.description: An Act to regulate the rights of the parties to leases of requisitioned land with respect to the making good of damage occurring during the requisition, and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Prize Salvage Act 1944
items.description: An Act to prevent claims for prize salvage being made or relied upon without the consent of the Admiralty or the Secretary of State.

items.title: Compensation of Displaced Officers (War Service) Act 1945 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to provide for the compensation of persons who have been engaged in war service and are not reemployed or suffer loss of employment, reduction of emoluments or deterioration in their conditions, of employment by reason of changes affecting the functions of local or public authorities or public utility undertakers or changes in the management of schools.

items.title: Police (His Majesty's Inspectors of Constabulary) Act 1945
Northern Ireland (Miscellaneous Provisions) Act 1945
items.description: An Act to make miscellaneous amendments in the law applicable to Northern Ireland and, as respects securities issued or guaranteed by the Government of Northern Ireland, to amend certain enactments relating to trustees and savings banks.

items.title: Limitation (Enemies and War Prisoner) Act 1945
items.description: An Act to provide for suspending the operation of certain statutes of limitation in relation to proceedings affecting persons who have been enemies or have been detained in enemy territory.

items.title: Local Authorities Loans Act 1945
items.description: An Act to prohibit the borrowing of money by local authorities otherwise than from the Public Works Loan Commissioners, to amend section five of the Public Works Loans Act, 1941, and to make further provision with respect to local loans and the borrowing powers of local authorities.

items.title: Ministry of Fuel and Power Act 1945
items.description: An Act to make further provision with respect to the appointment and functions of the Minister of Fuel and Power, and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Welsh Church (Burial Grounds) Act 1945
items.description: An Act to amend the provisions of the Welsh Church Act, 1914, relating to burial grounds and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Law Reform (Contributory Negligence) Act 1945
items.description: An Act to amend the law relating to contributory negligence and. for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Local Elections and Register of Electors (Temporary Provisions) Act 1944
Education (Scotland) Act 1945
items.description: An Act to amend the law relating to education in Scotland.

items.title: Water Act 1945
items.description: An Act to make provision for the conservation and use of water resources and for water supplies and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Requisitioned Land and War Works Act 1945
items.description: An Act to authorise the acquisition of certain land used or dealt with for war purposes and to make other provision as to such land ; to remove doubts as to the powers of certain Ministers to acquire land under the Defence Act, 1842; to amend certain of the enactments relating to compensation in respect of land; and for purposes, connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Finance (No. 2) Act 1945
items.description: An Act to grant certain duties, to alter other duties, and to amend the law relating to the Public Revenue and the National Debt, and to make further provision in connection with Finance.

items.title: Public Health (Scotland) Act 1945
items.description: An Act to consolidate with amendments the provisions of Part IV of the Public Health (Scotland) Act, 1897, as amended by the Public Health Act, 1904, relating to epidemic, endemic or infectious diseases.

items.title: Police (Overseas Service) Act 1945
items.description: An Act to provide for the maintenance of British civil police forces in certain countries and territories outside the United Kingdom; for the discipline and pensions of members of such forces ; and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Statutory Orders (Special Procedure) Act 1945
items.description: An Act to regulate the procedure to be followed in connection with statutory orders required by any future enactment to be subject to special parliamentary procedure; to apply such procedure to orders made under certain existing enactments; and to enable such procedure to be applied to certain other orders.

items.title: Bank of England Act 1946
items.description: An Act to bring the capital stock of the Bank of England into public ownership and bring the Bank under public control, to make provision with respect to the relations between the Treasury, the Bank of England and other banks and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Agriculture (Artificial Insemination) Act 1946
items.description: An Act to enable the Minister of Agriculture and Fisheries and the Secretary of State to make contributions and establish centres for the purposes of research as to the practice of artificial insemination of livestock; to provide for the payment of grants out of moneys provided by Parliament in respect of initial losses incurred in the operation of certain centres for the artificial insemination of cattle ; and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Trunk Roads Act 1946
items.description: An Act to amend the law relating to Trunk Roads ; and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Ministers of the Crown (Transfer of Functions) Act 1946
Agricultural Development (Ploughing Up of Land) Act 1946
Buildings Restrictions (War-Time Contraventions) Act 1946
items.description: An Act to make provision as respects works on land carried out during the war period, and uses of land begun during that period, which do not comply with building laws or planning control.

items.title: National Service (Release of Conscientious Objectors) Act 1946
items.description: An Act to enable conscientious objectors conditionally registered under the National Service Acts, 1939 to 1942, to be released, before the date on which the present emergency is deemed to end for the purposes of those Acts, from the condition subject to which they were registered.

items.title: Miscellaneous Financial Provisions Act 1946
items.description: An Act to extend the powers of the Treasury to raise money under section one of the National Loans Act, 1939 to make pro vision as to certain obligations arising out of or in connection with the war, to charge certain payments under the War Damage Act, 1943, on the Consolidated Fund, to provide for a temporary increase in the capital of the Civil Contingencies Fund, to amend the Defence Loans Act, 1937, and to increase the salary of the Comptroller and Auditor-General.

items.title: Public Works Loans Act 1946 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to make further provision as to the appointment of the Public Works Loan Commissioners, to grant money for the purpose of certain local loans out of the Local Loans Fund and for other purposes relating to local loans.

items.title: Camberwell, Bristol and Nottingham Elections (Validation) Act 1946
United Nations Act 1946
items.description: An Act to enable effect to be given to certain provisions of the Charter of the United Nations.

items.title: Acquisition of Land (Authorisation Procedure) Act 1946
